title: FCRF’s Premier Cyber Law Certification Returns With 2nd Cohort for Lawyers, Investigators and Compliance Professionals
description: Future Crime Research Foundation (FCRF) Academy has opened registrations for the second cohort of its Certified Cyber Law Practitioner (CCLP) programme, a four-week weekend certification designed for lawyers, law students, in-house counsel, compliance professionals, police officers, cybercrime investigators and digital-risk practitioners. The upcoming cohort begins on June 6, with live weekend classes from 11 AM to 1 PM, a structured 16-module curriculum, lifetime access to recordings and learni
